title: Fresh Outlines
description: A resource pack that adds outlines to blocks!
body:
# A simple yet advanced outline resource pack!
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9db36a12f20985537ccd52974126601cd2aa428f_0.webp)

![block ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7424364d6805746fb68533410c1185fdaece419d_0.webp)
(Contributions are welcome, they'll be added to the pack.mcmeta as credits)

this outline resource pack has features like:
<details>
  <summary>Dark outlines</summary>
  
These outlines are visible in any situation, can be useful to know where a block ends
![Dark Outlines](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e5a71eafff75facc2f6340bd64099961cc4e4525.png)
</details>

<details>
  <summary>Glowing outlines</summary>
  
These outlines are visible in the dark, they use PBR emission!
![Glowing Outlines](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4998ca92a4985322aa17621c6f23974a048c7541.png)
</details>

<details>
  <summary>SSS Outlines</summary>
  
The outlines will let light pass through when under sunlight! they use labPBR SSS to work

(requires a shader with labPBR support)
![SSS Outlines](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/70695dc4933ca420dfde31d332e63a0cd6ead3f3.png)
</details>

## Terms Of Usage

1. You may use and modify this pack to your liking as long as you follow rule 4.
1. You may make content with this resource pack and credit me by using at least one of these links:
    - `https://joaquixlab.com/project/fresh-outlines`
    - `https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-outlines`
    - `https://www.patreon.com/joaquix1021`
1. You may not credit the pack in your name.
1. You may not redistribute the pack or its textures without permission.
